blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
